test_case: Measure first-sample and steady-state latency on at least one Apple Silicon host
reason_not_measured: Arbiter host is Windows 11; no Apple-Silicon hardware available at spike time. Acceptance matrix for #450 authorises 'honest could-not-measure rationale + follow-up blocker' for this exact case.

metrics_to_record.name: first_sample_latency_ms
metrics_to_record.definition: Wall-clock time between start_capture() returning and the first audio callback delivering >= 1 sample.
metrics_to_record.rationale: WASAPI loopback baseline on Windows is typically 50–200 ms; we accept up to 500 ms on first sample because SCK requires a content-discovery round-trip.

metrics_to_record.name: steady_state_latency_ms_p50
metrics_to_record.definition: Median end-to-end latency from acoustic event at the system mixer to the i16 sample landing in the AudioSource consumer.
metrics_to_record.rationale: Mirrors the Windows WASAPI target inherited by the AudioSource trait.

metrics_to_record.name: steady_state_latency_ms_p95
metrics_to_record.definition: 95th-percentile end-to-end latency over a 60 s steady-state window.

metrics_to_record.name: steady_state_latency_ms_p99
metrics_to_record.definition: 99th-percentile end-to-end latency over a 60 s steady-state window.

metrics_to_record.name: chunk_jitter_ms_stddev
metrics_to_record.definition: Standard deviation of inter-callback gap times.

hosts_required: Apple Silicon M1 or newer, macOS 13.x
Apple Silicon M1 or newer, macOS 14.x
measurement_protocol.first_sample_method: Record monotonic timestamp immediately before tui_macos_start (or stream.play()) returns; record monotonic timestamp inside the first audio callback. Subtract.
measurement_protocol.steady_state_method: Play a known impulse pattern through the system output (or directly into BlackHole 2ch); cross-correlate against the captured stream to derive end-to-end latency per pulse; bucket into a histogram and report p50/p95/p99.
measurement_protocol.sample_count: At least 600 impulses spread across the 60 s window for a stable percentile estimate.

notes: Populating 'result' requires MACOS-01b on real hardware. Do NOT estimate or interpolate from Windows numbers.
